facial_anchors.features: Young, slightly rugged Asian face, relaxed but steady gaze, natural eyebrows
facial_anchors.hair: Messy black hair tied in a loose top-knot, curly strands framing the face
facial_anchors.skin: Tanned, sun-kissed, visible pores, realistic dirty/dusty texture for desert environment

costume_anchors.clothing: Rough brown/earth-tone travel robes, tattered edges, layered linen, leather straps across the chest
accessories: Large wooden wine gourd tied with rope at the waist
Traditional bone/paper lantern with warm glow, hanging from a stick or held
Plain steel Dao (saber) with a simple dark hilt
costume_anchors.aesthetic: Wandering swordsman, dusty, travel-worn, loose and functional

visual_quality_spec: 8K, 35mm film grain, Low-key desert sunset lighting, Tyndall effect with dust particles, high-contrast, extreme texture detail on rough linen and leather.
